differences.title: 1. ACID Compliance
differences.leftDesc: Guarantees data integrity and reliability with full ACID compliance.
differences.rightDesc: Offers robust ACID compliance, widely used for transactional integrity.

differences.title: 2. Extensibility
differences.leftDesc: Supports custom functions, data types, and operators.
differences.rightDesc: Offers standard SQL features and common extensions.

differences.title: 3. JSON Support
differences.leftDesc: Native JSONB type for efficient querying and indexing.
differences.rightDesc: Supports JSON data type with limited indexing capabilities.

differences.title: 4. Concurrency Control
differences.leftDesc: Multi-Version Concurrency Control for high concurrency reads.
differences.rightDesc: Primarily uses locking mechanisms, can impact write performance.

differences.title: 5. Licensing
differences.leftDesc: PostgreSQL License is very permissive, no lock-in concerns.
differences.rightDesc: GPL license has some copyleft restrictions.

differences.title: 6. Replication
differences.leftDesc: Offers logical and physical replication, versatile options.
differences.rightDesc: Provides robust statement-based and row-based replication.

differences.title: 7. Community & Support
differences.leftDesc: Vibrant, active open-source community driving innovation.
differences.rightDesc: Extensive ecosystem, wide adoption, and many commercial options.
